angles.hook: Everyone's celebrating this launch. Here's why they shouldn't be.
angles.thesis: The benchmarks hide a critical limitation.
angles.reasoning: Contrarian takes on popular news perform well

angles.hook: This happened before. In 2014, with Docker.
angles.thesis: The adoption curve mirrors Docker's — and we know how that ended.

angles.hook: I tested this for 3 hours. Here's what actually works.
angles.thesis: The framework excels at X but fails at Y.

angles.hook: This model will be irrelevant in 6 months. Here's why.
angles.thesis: The open-source velocity will commoditize this within two release cycles.

angles.hook: If you're an ML engineer, this changes your job tomorrow.
angles.thesis: The skill requirements for ML engineers just shifted dramatically.
